attributes.name: legal_person_id
attributes.description: The EUID or other legal person identifier of the company.

attributes.name: legal_person_name
attributes.description: The registered name of the company.

attributes.name: issuer_name
attributes.description: Name of the authority or organization that issued the LPID attestation.

attributes.name: issuer_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the issuing authority (e.g. business register identifier for BRIS).

attributes.name: issuer_country
attributes.description: Alpha-2 country code, as defined in ISO 3166-1, of the issuing country.

attributes.name: issuance_date
attributes.description: Date and possibly time of issuance, including timezone offset (ISO 8601).

attributes.name: expiry_date
attributes.description: Date and possibly time of expiration, including timezone offset (ISO 8601).

attributes.name: authentic_source_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the authentic source of the data (e.g. business register identifier such as BRIS, HRB, etc.).

attributes.name: authentic_source_name
attributes.description: Human-readable name of the authentic source that issued the instance.

credentials.schemaDescription: This schema represents the claim set of an SD-JWT based Verifiable Credential for the LPID (Legal Person ID) attestation as a single, flat JSON object. It is derived from the EWC PID Rulebook and aligned with the IETF SD-JWT VC data model: generic SD-JWT VC claims (iss, sub, vct, iat, nbf, exp, jti, cnf) are defined alongside the domain-specific LPID claims. Implementations may conceptually treat this as a layered model (base + domain), but the structure is flat for systems that expect a single JSON Schema document, such as current organizational wallet templates.

attributes.name: vct
attributes.description: Verifiable Credential Type (VCT) identifier for the BRI attestation, as defined in the rulebook.

attributes.name: datetime_of_expiry
attributes.description: Administrative expiry date and time, including timezone offset (ISO 8601).

attributes.name: datetime_of_issuance
attributes.description: Administrative issuance date and time, including timezone offset (optional).

attributes.name: issuing_authority
attributes.description: Name of the issuing authority (e.g. the Dutch Tax Administration).

attributes.name: trust_anchor
attributes.description: Reference (URL or identifier) to the applicable trust anchor (optional).

attributes.name: subject
attributes.description: Subject attributes (subset of PID) as defined in the mapping table in section 3.1.1.

attributes.name: nl_bld_bri
attributes.description: Income data as registered in the Dutch Basisregistratie Inkomen (BRI) for a specific year.

credentials.schemaDescription: This schema represents the claim set of an SD-JWT based Verifiable Credential for the BRI (Income) attestation as a single, flat JSON object. It is derived from the BRI Rulebook (urn:eudi:nl:nl_bld_bri:1)

attributes.name: issuing_authority
attributes.description: Name of the issuer that issued the credential

attributes.name: authentic_source_id
attributes.description: EUID of the data providing entity

attributes.name: authentic_source_name
attributes.description: Name of the data providing entity

credentials.schemaDescription: This schema represents the claim set of an SD-JWT based Verifiable Credential for the BRP (Persons) attestation as a single, flat JSON object.

attributes.name: subject
attributes.description: Subject attributes (subset of PID) used to identify the natural person.

attributes.name: board_history
attributes.description: List of company roles the subject holds or has held as registered in the KVK Handelsregister.

attributes.name: board_disqualification
attributes.description: Result of the board disqualification check: false = no active ban, true = an active board disqualification exists.

attributes.name: issuing_authority
attributes.description: Name of the issuer that issued the credential

credentials.schemaDescription: This schema represents the claim set of an SD-JWT based Verifiable Credential for describing a natural person's roles in companies and the result of a board disqualification check.
This schema represents the claim set of an SD-JWT based Verifiable Credential for Contact Details (verified email and phone number) attestation as a single, flat JSON object.

attributes.name: currency_code
attributes.description: Currency code of the invoice, as defined in ISO 4217:2015

attributes.name: tax_exclusive_amount
attributes.description: Amount of the invoice excluding taxes

attributes.name: tax_inclusive_amount
attributes.description: Amount of the invoice including taxes

attributes.name: evidence
attributes.description: The original evidence documents, such as the UBL 2.0 invoice

credentials.schemaDescription: This schema represents the claim set of an SD-JWT based Verifiable Credential for the eInvoice attestation as a single, flat JSON object. It is based on UBL attributes and aligned with the IETF SD-JWT VC data model: generic SD-JWT VC claims (iss, sub, vct, iat, nbf, exp, jti, cnf) are defined alongside the domain-specific LPID claims. Implementations may conceptually treat this as a layered model (base + domain), but the structure is flat for systems that expect a single JSON Schema document, such as current organizational wallet templates.

attributes.name: vct
attributes.description: Verifiable Credential Data Model Type identifier for the Sustainability Declaration attestation, as defined by the Clean Fuel Protocol (CFP).

attributes.name: sdNumber
attributes.description: Unique number of the Sustainability Declaration as issued under the sustainability scheme.

attributes.name: sdIssuanceDate
attributes.description: Date of issuance of the Sustainability Declaration, as stated on the ISCC SD form.

attributes.name: scheme
attributes.description: Name of the sustainability certification scheme.

attributes.name: schemeVersion
attributes.description: Version of the sustainability certification scheme.

attributes.name: ISCCcertificateNumber
attributes.description: Certificate registration number under the sustainability scheme (e.g. ISCC certificate number of the certified supplier).

attributes.name: supplierName
attributes.description: Name of the certified supplier issuing this Sustainability Declaration.

attributes.name: supplierIdentifier
attributes.description: Business identifier of the supplier, such as KVK, VAT/BTW, SIREN, SIRET, GLN, or other trade identifiers.

attributes.name: supplierDid
attributes.description: DID of the supplier (organisation wallet) issuing this Sustainability Declaration.

attributes.name: recipientName
attributes.description: Name of the recipient of the sustainable material, as stated on the Sustainability Declaration.

attributes.name: recipientIdentifier
attributes.description: Business identifier of the recipient, such as KVK, VAT/BTW, GLN, etc.

attributes.name: recipientDid
attributes.description: DID of the recipient organisation (organisation wallet) to which this Sustainability Declaration applies.

attributes.name: recipientAddress
attributes.description: Postal address or place of destination (location of the recipient) as stated on the Sustainability Declaration.

attributes.name: dateOfDispatch
attributes.description: Date of dispatch of the sustainable material as recorded on the Sustainability Declaration.

attributes.name: productType
attributes.description: Type of product, e.g. raw material or intermediate product such as crude oil.

attributes.name: rawMaterialType
attributes.description: Type of raw material as defined in the Sustainability Declaration (ideally selected from the ISCC raw material list).

attributes.name: countryOfOrigin
attributes.description: Country of origin of the raw material, ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code.

attributes.name: quantity
attributes.description: Quantity of sustainable material covered by this Sustainability Declaration.

attributes.name: isccCompliantMaterial
attributes.description: Indicates that the material is "ISCC Compliant material" according to the ISCC template.

attributes.name: euRedCompliantMaterial
attributes.description: Indicates that the material is "EU RED Compliant material" according to the ISCC template.

attributes.name: chainOfCustodyOption
attributes.description: Chain of custody option applied to this material as recorded on the Sustainability Declaration.

attributes.name: isWasteOrResidue
attributes.description: Indicates that the raw material meets the definition of waste or residue according to RED III.

attributes.name: totalDefaultGhgValueApplied
attributes.description: Indicates that a total default value according to RED III was applied for the GHG emission calculation.

attributes.name: ghgCalculationUnit
attributes.description: Unit used for the GHG emission calculation for raw materials and intermediate products. Default is kgCO2eq/dry-ton.

credentials.schemaDescription: Light variant of the Clean Fuel Sustainability Declaration (SD) JSON Schema. This version is intended for early pilots and prototypes and focuses on a minimal subset of fields that are most critical for linking SDs to PoS and to physical batches. It follows the same naming conventions as the full SD schema and the PoS schema.

attributes.name: vct
attributes.description: The Verifiable Credential Type (VCT) for this ISCC demo certificate.

attributes.name: systemUserCertificate
attributes.description: The certificate ID as shown on the official ISCC PDF (may differ from the certificate number).

attributes.name: scheme
attributes.description: The ISCC scheme applicable to this certificate.

attributes.name: systemUserName
attributes.description: Official name of the certified company.

attributes.name: systemUserNumber
attributes.description: The official ISCC System User Number (SUN).

attributes.name: country
attributes.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code where the certificate applies.

attributes.name: certificationBody
attributes.description: Name of the ISCC-recognised Certification Body (CB) that issued this certificate.

credentials.schemaDescription: A simplified ISCC certificate credential for demo purposes. Contains only essential information issued by an ISCC Certification Body (CB).

attributes.name: vc
attributes.description: Data model identifier for the CFP Role Credential.

attributes.name: cfpRoles
attributes.description: One or more Clean Fuel Protocol roles assigned to the organization.

credentials.schemaDescription: Domain model for a Clean Fuel Protocol Role Credential. This credential asserts one or more supply-chain roles for an organization. It follows the FIDES JSON Schema pattern: only credentialSubject fields are defined here.

attributes.name: vct
attributes.description: The Verifiable Credential Type (VCT) that identifies this ISCC Certification Body credential. Required. Example: urn:org:iscc.iscc-cb:1

attributes.name: cbName
attributes.description: The official name of the ISCC Certification Body (CB). Required. Example: DEKRA Certification B.V.

attributes.name: cbId
attributes.description: The ISCC-internal Certification Body identifier or another stable ID used by ISCC to reference this CB. Required. Example: ISCC-CB-220

attributes.name: legalPersonId
attributes.description: The official registration identifier of the Certification Body, such as EUID, VAT number, or Chamber of Commerce number. Optional. Example: NL123456789B01

attributes.name: isccSchemes
attributes.description: The ISCC schemes for which this Certification Body is officially recognised. Required. Typical values include: ISCC EU, ISCC PLUS, ISCC CORSIA.

attributes.name: recognitionStatus
attributes.description: The current ISCC recognition status of the Certification Body. Required. Example: active

attributes.name: recognitionDate
attributes.description: The date on which the Certification Body was first recognised by ISCC for the relevant schemes. Required. ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD). Example: 2024-05-20

attributes.name: recognitionExpiry
attributes.description: The expiry date of the current ISCC recognition, if applicable. ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD). Example: 2027-05-20

attributes.name: regions
attributes.description: The regions and/or countries in which this Certification Body is allowed to perform ISCC audits. Values can be regional labels (e.g. EU, Europe, Global) or ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes (e.g. NL, DE). Optional.

attributes.name: scopes
attributes.description: The audit scopes for which this Certification Body is recognised under ISCC (for example, traceability, waste & residues, GHG verification, RFNBO/SAF). Optional.

attributes.name: officialWebsite
attributes.description: The official website of the Certification Body. Optional. Example: https://www.dekra-certification.nl

attributes.name: certificateLookup
attributes.description: A public URL where ISCC certificates or audit information for this CB or its clients can be looked up. Optional. Example: https://certificates.iscc-system.org

credentials.schemaDescription: This schema defines a Verifiable Credential with the ISCC recognition details of a Certification Body (CB). It only contains domain-specific claims and is intended to be combined with a base SD-JWT VC layer by the wallet or ecosystem.

attributes.name: vct
attributes.description: The Verifiable Credential Type uniquely identifying this credential.

attributes.name: revUserName
attributes.description: Official name of the organisation as registered in the REV.

attributes.name: revUserNumber
attributes.description: The unique organisation identifier used by NEa in the REV (REV user number).

attributes.name: revRoles
attributes.description: De rol(len) van de organisatie binnen het REV, zoals erkend door de NEa.

attributes.name: registrationDate
attributes.description: Datum waarop de organisatie als REV-gebruiker is geregistreerd (DD-MM-YYYY).

credentials.schemaDescription: A minimal Verifiable Credential issued by the Dutch Emissions Authority (NEa) confirming that an organisation is a registered user of the Register Energie voor Vervoer (REV).

attributes.name: issuing_notary
attributes.description: Name of the notarial office or notary issuing this attestation.

attributes.name: issuing_notary_id
attributes.description: Identifier of the notary or notarial office (e.g., KNB number).

attributes.name: founder
attributes.description: Basic identification attributes of the founder.

attributes.name: verifications
attributes.description: Overview of the verified credentials the notary used.

credentials.schemaDescription: An SD-JWT VC attesting that a notary verified a founder's data and used it to produce a notarial deed for the incorporation of a company.

attributes.name: nationalities
attributes.description: One or more alpha-2 country codes as specified in ISO 3166-1, representing the nationality of the user to whom the person identification data relates.

attributes.name: birth_family_name
attributes.description: Last name(s) or surname(s) of the person identification data user at the time of birth.

attributes.name: birth_given_name
attributes.description: First name(s), including middle name(s), of the person identification data user at the time of birth.

attributes.name: email
attributes.description: Electronic mail address of the user to whom the person identification data relates [in conformance with RFC 5322].

attributes.name: phone_number
attributes.description: Mobile telephone number of the user to whom the person identification data relates, starting with the ‘+’ symbol as the international code prefix and the country code, followed by numbers only.

attributes.name: picture
attributes.description: Facial image of the wallet user compliant with ISO 19794-5 or ISO 39794 specifications.The image SHALL be encoded as binary data.

attributes.name: personal_administrative_number
attributes.description: A value assigned to the natural person that is unique among all personal administrative numbers issued by the provider of person identification data. Where Member States opt to include this attribute, they shall describe in their electronic identification schemes under which the person identification data is issued, the policy that they apply to the values of this attribute, including, where applicable, specific conditions for the processing of this value.

attributes.name: sex
attributes.description: Values shall be one of the following: 0 = not known; 1 = male; 2 = female; 3 = other; 4 = inter; 5 = diverse; 6 = open; 9 = not applicable. For values 0, 1, 2 and 9, ISO/IEC 5218 applies.

attributes.name: age_over_18
attributes.description: Attesting whether the User to whom the person identification data relates is currently an adult (true) or a minor (false). (specified only in the ARF PID rulebook).

attributes.name: age_in_years
attributes.description: The current age of the User to whom the person identification data relates in years. (specified only in the ARF PID rulebook).

attributes.name: age_birth_year
attributes.description: The year when the User to whom the person identification data relates was born. (specified only in the ARF PID rulebook).

credentials.schemaDescription: This schema represents the claim set of an SD-JWT based Verifiable Credential for the PID (Person Identification Data) attestation as a single, flat JSON object. It is derived from the EWC PID Rulebook (WP3)

This schema represents the claim set of an SD-JWT based Verifiable Credential for the VAT (Tax) attestation as a single, flat JSON object. It is aligned with the IETF SD-JWT VC data model: generic SD-JWT VC claims (iss, sub, vct, iat, nbf, exp, jti, cnf) are defined alongside the domain-specific LPID claims. Implementations may conceptually treat this as a layered model (base + domain), but the structure is flat for systems that expect a single JSON Schema document, such as current organizational wallet templates.

attributes.name: check_type
attributes.description: Type of criminal record check, e.g. Basic

attributes.name: learning_achievement
attributes.description: Type of diploma awarded, e.g. Master International Law

attributes.name: learning_achievement
attributes.description: Type of diploma awarded, e.g. VWO

credentials.shortDescription: UNTP credential for expressing conformity assessments.

attributes.name: @context
attributes.description: A list of JSON-LD context URIs that define the seamntic meaning of prperties within the credential.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: A unique identifier (URI) assigned to the product passport. May be a UUID

attributes.name: issuer
attributes.description: The organisation that is the isuer of this VC. Note that the "id" property MUST be a W3C DID.  Other identifiers such as tax registration numbers can be listed in the "otherIdentifiers" property.

attributes.name: validFrom
attributes.description: The date and time from which the credential is valid.

attributes.name: validUntil
attributes.description: The expiry date (if applicable) of this verifiable credential.

attributes.name: credentialSubject
attributes.description: The conformity attestion is the subject of the verifiable credential.

credentials.schemaDescription: A conformity attestation issued by a competent body that defines one or more assessments (eg carbon intensity) about a product (eg batttery) against a specification (eg LCA method) defined in a standard or regulation.

credentials.shortDescription: UNTP credential for product-level sustainability and compliance data.

attributes.name: @context
attributes.description: A list of JSON-LD context URIs that define the seamntic meaning of prperties within the credential.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: A unique identifier (URI) assigned to the product passport. May be a UUID

attributes.name: issuer
attributes.description: The organisation that is the isuer of this VC. Note that the "id" property MUST be a W3C DID.  Other identifiers such as tax registration numbers can be listed in the "otherIdentifiers" property.

attributes.name: validFrom
attributes.description: The date and time from which the credential is valid.

attributes.name: validUntil
attributes.description: The expiry date (if applicable) of this verifiable credential.

attributes.name: credentialSubject
attributes.description: The subject of a digital product passport credential is the identified product.

credentials.schemaDescription: The ProductPassport is a comprehensive data structure that encapsulates various details pertaining to a product, including its identification details, who issued it, batch information, provernance information, circularity information and a set of verifable product confomrity & sistainability claims.

credentials.shortDescription: UNTP credential for lifecycle events in a value chain.

attributes.name: @context
attributes.description: A list of JSON-LD context URIs that define the seamntic meaning of prperties within the credential.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: A unique identifier (URI) assigned to the product passport. May be a UUID

attributes.name: issuer
attributes.description: The organisation that is the isuer of this VC. Note that the "id" property MUST be a W3C DID.  Other identifiers such as tax registration numbers can be listed in the "otherIdentifiers" property.

attributes.name: validFrom
attributes.description: The date and time from which the credential is valid.

attributes.name: validUntil
attributes.description: The expiry date (if applicable) of this verifiable credential.

attributes.name: credentialSubject
attributes.description: VC subject is the transaction event structure

credentials.schemaDescription: Traceability Event as a VC

credentials.shortDescription: UNTP credential carrying facility data and sustainability performance.

attributes.name: @context
attributes.description: A list of JSON-LD context URIs that define the seamntic meaning of prperties within the credential.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: A unique identifier (URI) assigned to the product passport. May be a UUID

attributes.name: issuer
attributes.description: The organisation that is the isuer of this VC. Note that the "id" property MUST be a W3C DID.  Other identifiers such as tax registration numbers can be listed in the "otherIdentifiers" property.

attributes.name: validFrom
attributes.description: The date and time from which the credential is valid.

attributes.name: validUntil
attributes.description: The expiry date (if applicable) of this verifiable credential.

attributes.name: credentialSubject
attributes.description: The subject of a digitial facility record is a Facility

credentials.schemaDescription: A digital verifiable credential hodling faiclity performance inofmration.

credentials.shortDescription: UNTP credential anchoring a DID to a registered identity.
Trade document describing the commercial transaction.

attributes.name: purchaseOrderNumber
attributes.description: Identifier assigned by the buyer to an order.

attributes.name: contractNumber
attributes.description: Identifier of a contract concluded between parties such as between buyer and seller.

attributes.name: invoiceNumber
attributes.description: Reference number to identify an invoice.

attributes.name: issueDate
attributes.description: Date that a document was issued and when appropriate, signed or otherwise authenticated.

attributes.name: invoiceDate
attributes.description: Date of issue of an invoice.

attributes.name: paymentDueDate
attributes.description: Date when an amount due should be made available to the creditor under the terms of payment.

attributes.name: billOfLadingNumber
attributes.description: Carrier-issued Bill of Lading or Waybill number for the shipment.

attributes.name: letterOfCreditNumber
attributes.description: Letter of Credit reference number if applicable for payment.

attributes.name: portOfEntry
attributes.description: Port where the goods will enter the destination country.

attributes.name: destinationCountry
attributes.description: Two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for final destination.

attributes.name: buyer
attributes.description: Party to which merchandise or services are sold.

attributes.name: invoicee
attributes.description: Party to whom an invoice is issued.

attributes.name: consignee
attributes.description: Party to whom the goods are consigned (may differ from buyer).

attributes.name: sellersBank
attributes.description: Bank designated by the seller to receive payment.

attributes.name: seller
attributes.description: Party selling merchandise or services to a buyer.

attributes.name: sellerBankAccountNumber
attributes.description: Identifier of an account with the bank designated to receive payment.

attributes.name: originalLoadingLocation
attributes.description: Seaport, airport, freight terminal, rail station or other location where the goods were first loaded onto the means of transport being utilised for their carriage.

attributes.name: originCountry
attributes.description: Name of the country in which the goods have been produced or manufactured, according to criteria laid down for the application of the Customs tariff or quantitative restrictions, or any measure related to trade.

attributes.name: tradeTermsConditionsDescription
attributes.description: Free form description of delivery or transport terms (Incoterms).

attributes.name: tradeTermsConditionsCode
attributes.description: Code specifying the delivery or transport terms (Incoterms).

attributes.name: paymentTerms
attributes.description: Identification of the terms of payment between the parties to a transaction (generic term).

attributes.name: paymentMethod
attributes.description: Code specifying a method of payment.

attributes.name: insuranceCost
attributes.description: Cost of insurance for the shipment.

attributes.name: totalAmount
attributes.description: Total monetary amount charged in respect of one or more invoices.

credentials.schemaDescription: A commercial document which consists of an itemized account of goods or services delivered, together with a demand for payment.

credentials.shortDescription: Transport document representing shipment and ownership.

attributes.name: billOfLadingNumber
attributes.description: Reference number to identify a document evidencing a transport contract.

attributes.name: documentIdentifier
attributes.description: Reference number identifying a specific document.

attributes.name: bookingReferenceNumber
attributes.description: Reference number assigned by a carrier to identify a specific consignment.

attributes.name: issueDate
attributes.description: Date that a document was issued.

attributes.name: consignmentLoadingDate
attributes.description: Date when a consignment is loaded onto a means of transport.

attributes.name: estimatedTimeOfDeparture
attributes.description: Date and time when a transport means is scheduled to depart.

attributes.name: estimatedTimeOfArrival
attributes.description: Date and time of the estimated arrival of means of transport.

attributes.name: consignor
attributes.description: Party consigning goods as stipulated in the transport contract.

attributes.name: consignee
attributes.description: Party to which goods are consigned.

attributes.name: carrier
attributes.description: Party providing the transport of goods between named points.

attributes.name: freightPayer
attributes.description: Party responsible for the payment of freight charges.

attributes.name: originalLoadingLocation
attributes.description: Location where the goods were first loaded onto the means of transport.

attributes.name: baseportUnloadingLocation
attributes.description: The place or port at which the cargo is discharged.

attributes.name: deliveryLocation
attributes.description: Location to which a consignment is to be delivered to the final consignee.

attributes.name: placeOfDeparture
attributes.description: Port from which a means of transport is scheduled to depart.

attributes.name: arrivalLocation
attributes.description: Port at which a means of transport is scheduled to arrive.

attributes.name: paymentLocation
attributes.description: Place where the payment has been or should be made.

attributes.name: placeOfIssue
attributes.description: Location where a document was issued.

attributes.name: conveyanceReferenceNumber
attributes.description: Identifier of a journey of a means of transport, for example voyage number.

attributes.name: transportMeansIdentifier
attributes.description: Name of a specific means of transport such as the vessel name.

attributes.name: transportMeansRegistration
attributes.description: Identifier of a specific means of transport.

attributes.name: containerSizeAndType
attributes.description: Code specifying the characteristics, i.e. size and type of a piece of transport equipment.

attributes.name: fullOrEmptyContainer
attributes.description: Code specifying how full a piece of transport equipment is (5=Full).

attributes.name: transportEquipmentIdentifier
attributes.description: Identifier of a piece of transport equipment e.g. container.

attributes.name: sealIdentifier
attributes.description: The identification number of a seal affixed to a piece of transport equipment.

attributes.name: descriptionOfGoods
attributes.description: Plain language description of the nature of a goods item.

attributes.name: consignmentSummaryDescription
attributes.description: Plain language description of a consignment in summary terms.

attributes.name: shippingMarks
attributes.description: Free form description of the marks and numbers on a transport unit or package.

attributes.name: transportContractConditions
attributes.description: Reference to carrier's conditions of carriage.

attributes.name: prepaidAmount
attributes.description: Monetary amount of charges which have been paid in advance.

attributes.name: collectCharges
attributes.description: Monetary amount of charges to be collected from the consignee.

attributes.name: contractNumber
attributes.description: Identifier of a contract concluded between parties.

attributes.name: ucr
attributes.description: Unique Consignment Reference identifying a particular consignment.

attributes.name: goods
attributes.description: Goods covered by the bill of lading

credentials.schemaDescription: A transport document issued by a carrier acknowledging receipt of cargo for shipment and evidencing the contract of carriage and title to the goods.
